Params: {3: 'A strange underwater scene appears before you.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'What a surprise, finding the Gray Raven Commandant here in this shithole.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'Since we seem to be in this together, I\'ve got a favor to ask.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'Connect my M.I.N.D. I\'ve been wandering around here for so long, my M.I.N.D. is turning into mush.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'We\'ve come this far... things have gone far beyond Lithos\' expectations. What happens next is anyone\'s guess.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'If I can\'t make it back, bring a message to Valeria for me.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Tell them yourself!', 3: '25', 4: 'Shorthalt, listen, don\'t go any further—', 5: '25', 6: 'You need to go back with me.', 7: '25'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: 'Tell her to delete all my embarrassing videos—no, actually, just say hello to her and Wanshi for me.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'As if he didn\'t hear you, the man keeps talking to himself.'}
{3: 'But he doesn\'t stop, just keeps walking like he\'s in his own world.'}
{2: 'Shorthalt', 3: '"I\'ve seen enough of your face, don\'t bother looking for me", that\'s what I\'ll say.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The scene changes, danger in the darkness closing in fast—'}
{3: 'In an instant, body and soul are ripped apart.'}
{3: '"Did I save him this time?"\nWeird thought... The last time—which time was that?'}
{3: 'There is no time to confirm the situation behind when the feeling of suffocation suddenly hits.'}
{3: 'He doesn\'t even have time to cry out or utter final words before his sturdy body shatters into fragments.'}
{2: '??', 3: 'But at what cost? Risk our lives for samples?'}
{2: 'Vanessa', 3: 'To survive, we have to face the Red Tide.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vanessa', 3: 'Before that day comes, humans can\'t be completely clueless about their enemy—', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The blizzard drowns out the maiden\'s voice.'}
{3: 'Hearing a faint noise, the two conversing people simultaneously turn toward the source.'}
{3: 'The white-haired agent floats up, her lifeless eyes looking down at you.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'What if I hadn\'t? Are you always this reckless, counting on someone to save you?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'You should\'ve noticed—the Mutated Red Tide\'s gone completely haywire.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Chaos, who controlled the Red Tide, is losing power and being eaten by it.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Luna sounds certain, not surprised at your reaction at all.'}
{2: 'She just kept telling me to leave.', 3: '124'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'A new Agent Zero\'s forming, and I can\'t stop it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'We might still be able to help.', 3: '127'}
{3: 'Luna shakes her head, dismissing the naive idea.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'After the Mutated Red Tide surged, I lost my connection to the Ascension-Network.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'But as a former agent, I can still sense some changes.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'The Ascension-Network\'s evolving as information updates, or... "Information" keeps growing and expanding.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'The Punishing Virus keeps developing, but the amount of matter in this world stays the same.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A "new life" is being born, but... the cries of infants haven\'t been heard in human settlements for a very long time.'}
{2: 'Luna', 3: 'Did you find her, that girl Nanami?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Let Nanami set the parameters! Let me set you up as the new starting point for the simulation as you are...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'And "hope"... is the other reward you\'re getting.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'I\'m sure there will come a turning point where you\'ll find a perfect solution to the problems you\'re facing right now.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'This is what you... what your entire civilization has strived for.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'During the conversation, you start feeling dizzy again.'}
{3: 'After injecting another serum, Vanessa stares intently toward the base of the snowy mountain, her expression grim.'}
{3: 'Following her gaze, a pale figure stands amidst the Mutated Red Tide, but Chaos\'s form has almost vanished.'}
{3: 'Agent Zero is reforming within the churning tide.', 4: '1', 5: '2'}
{3: 'Luna extends her hand, slightly calming the Red Tide, though it has little effect.'}
{3: 'She\'s losing control of the Red Tide.'}
{3: 'Faint voices disappear in the wind. She seems to be searching for something in this dark world...'}
{3: 'With her remaining power, she creates a gentle barrier, pushing Vanessa and you out of her "territory".'}
{3: 'By the time you realize it, Vanessa and you are already banished from her territory.'}
{3: 'The icy wind makes it impossible to move forward.'}
{3: 'The girl uses the Ascension-Network\'s residual spatial isolation.'}
{3: 'The biting wind carries the girl\'s last words.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vanessa', 3: 'The Punishing Virus concentration is still going up. If you don\'t leave, you\'ll waste more than a few serums.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Vanessa falls silent and leads the way back.'}
{3: 'You quickly shoot down the Hetero-Creature behind Vanessa.'}
{3: 'Luna gathered all her "power" that was protecting the forest, giving the Hetero-Creatures the chance to launch attacks.'}
{3: 'A gunshot rings out, and Hetero-Creatures scream behind you.'}
{3: 'Looking back, the girl\'s slender silhouette has almost vanished from sight.'}
{3: 'After dealing with the Hetero-Creatures, you trudge through the snow.'}
{3: 'The blizzard batters her, trying to consume her.'}
{3: 'Once, she was that agent wielding unlimited power.'}
{3: 'She had a sister she could depend on, a knight loyal to her, and a timid yet resilient mermaid.'}
{3: 'Having broken free from her broken past, the world was once hers for the taking.'}
{3: 'Maybe in another life, she\'d have a peaceful future.'}
{3: 'At least she wouldn\'t be like this, watching people around her leave one by one...'}
{3: 'Her thoughts stop as the tide roars—the Mutated Red Tide coming for them on this pure land.'}
{3: 'She looks toward the mountain base, indifferent.'}
